name: Country Group Holdings Public Company Limited
summary: Country Group Holdings Public Company Limited, through its subsidiaries, primarily engages in the securities business in Thailand. It operates through three segments: Securities and Derivatives Brokerage, Investment Banking, and Securities and Derivatives Trading. The company offers securities brokerage, securities trading, securities underwriting, investment advisory, mutual fund management, private fund management, stock borrowing and lending, and venture capital management services. It is also involved in the derivatives trading, energy, finance advisory, and investment banking businesses. The company is headquartered in Bangkok, Thailand.
